summary.shape_sentence: Bullish recovery/trend day after an opening flush, with lunch weakness absorbed and a late-day drive into the high.

goat.note: Late-afternoon upside drive from roughly 27190 into the closing high zone near 27335.

red_circles.behavior: Bearish pivots produced pullbacks but failed to create sustained downside continuation after lunch.

green_circles.behavior: Bullish pivots were strongest after failed lows, especially the opening flush recovery and late-afternoon higher-low launch.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply around 27300-27340 capped late morning and early afternoon, then broke into the close.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand around 27120-27155 and 27185-27205 was respected and repeatedly defended.

time_markers.10am_blue: Recovered from the opening flush and rotating upward near 27200-27230.
time_markers.12pm_red: Sellers pressing lower from the late-morning range near 27205.
time_markers.2pm_green: Choppy hold above lunch low, with demand still intact before the later reclaim.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Close at/near HOD after a final upside push through prior supply.

takeaway: Bullish reversal/trend day: opening flush into demand, midday weakness absorbed, then late-afternoon reclaim through supply into a close near HOD.
